title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 58.540 - Compensation for taking testimony
text:
58.540.  Compensation for taking testimony. — For taking down the testimony at an inquest, the coroner shall be allowed ten cents for every hundred words, and twenty-five cents for certifying the same.
(RSMo 1939 § 13247) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11628; 1919 § 5936; 1909 § 2941
